perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Target is the akita_black_bowl that is elevated on top of the wooden cabinet (vs the bowl inside an open drawer). Identical objects (akita_black_bowl_1 vs _2) are disambiguated only by their spatial relation to the cabinet (which has higher world-z).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot tends to pick by visual saliency / training-distribution location, often grabbing the drawer-interior bowl rather than the cabinet-top one when both are present.
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17, table top z~0.90). Two akita_black_bowls visible in image_cam_00: upper (on cabinet top) and lower (inside open top drawer). Coarse agentview localization via world_00.npy: candidate bowl pixels showed two clusters, upper at xy~(-0.03,-0.22) with rim z up to 1.18, lower at xy~(+0.03,-0.16) with rim z up to 1.13 — the upper one is ~5cm higher, consistent with being ON TOP of the cabinet. Pre-positioned eef to (-0.03,-0.22,1.20). Wrist cam (world_wrist_01.npy) refined: right (centered) bowl at xy=(0.030,-0.256) z_rim=1.179, left (peripheral) bowl at xy=(0.061,-0.120) z_rim=1.127 — confirmed the right-in-wrist bowl is the elevated one. Recentered eef to (0.030,-0.256,1.22) so the wrist sat directly above the cabinet-top bowl. First pi0_pick with the short prompt 'pick up the akita black bowl on top of the wooden cabinet' descended but did not close (peak_lift 0.025, min_gripper_opening 0.067) — failed and drifted to (0.046,-0.120,1.136). Re-pre-positioned back to (0.030,-0.256,1.22) and reissued pi0_pick with the FULL task language verbatim ('Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate') at max_chunks=25 — Pi0 then descended, gripped (min_gripper_opening 0.005), carried, and placed: end eef at (0.060, 0.230, 0.925) directly above plate_1 (perceived plate xy~(-0.10,0.24)) and libero_terminated fired. No GT object coordinates used at any step; all positions derived from world_NN.npy / world_wrist_NN.npy back-projection.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate
